canvasTabs.label: Main
canvasTabs.description: The primary work surface — what users see when they open the worker

canvasTabs.label: Activity
canvasTabs.description: Recent activity, pending items, things to do

canvasTabs.label: Audit Trail
canvasTabs.description: Every action timestamped, identity-verified, chain-anchored where applicable

_notes.ids_are_stable: Tab ids are referenced by service.js and sample-data.js. Don't rename after first merge.
_notes.default_required: Exactly one tab must be default:true. It auto-opens on the user's second visit.
_notes.signal_almost_always: Use 'card:work-product' for almost all tabs. Other signals exist for specialized tabs — ask in review.
